title: 2026 Best Actor Prediction: Deadline's Analysis
text: Deadline's Winner Prediction: Michael B. Jordan for Sinners. The race underwent a dramatic shift when Jordan defeated frontrunner Timothée Chalamet at the recent SAG-AFTRA Awards. According to critic Pete Hammond, this victory sent a bolt of electricity through the room and reset this race which is now virtually anyone's to win. Chalamet had dominated earlier with wins at Critics Choice and Golden Globes, but lost at BAFTA to an ineligible contender, then fell to Jordan at the Actor Awards. The five nominees represent a highly competitive field: Michael B. Jordan (Sinners) - Current momentum favorite, Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme) - Early frontrunner, still viable, Leonardo DiCaprio (One Battle After Another), Ethan Hawke (Blue Moon) - Least-seen nominee, Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent). Hammond notes this category has produced different results all season long, suggesting genuine unpredictability despite Jordan's current edge.
